title: "I Carried A UFO With My Helicopter!" - UFO Whistleblower Jake Barber
summary: Jake Barber, a former Air Force special operations contractor and helicopter pilot, describes his firsthand involvement in retrieving non-human craft, including a 20-foot egg-shaped object. He details his military background, recruitment into classified programs, and subsequent work forming a private organization called Skywatcher Technologies that claims to be able to summon UAP on demand.

acronyms.definition: A 10-year Air Force contract program that fast-tracked recruits through special operations training
Selection site for Air Force Special Warfare Combat Control and Pararescue
Targets that require security and escort during transport
Enhanced electronic system that takes into account IR light for night operations
Government agency used as cover for contractor work
Term for life forms aboard a craft during transport operations

events.description: National Security Act passed, formation of the Air Force and CIA, two weeks after Roswell incident
Rendlesham Forest incident at RAF Bentwaters in Suffolk, UK
Jake Barber signed contract for combat control and shipped to basic training in Texas
After 9/11, Barber returned to California to work as a contractor for the intelligence community
Citizens Hearings held - mock congressional hearing with testimony on UAP
Gary Nolan was approached by CIA regarding biological effects on UAP/NHI experiencers

key_claims.claim: Retrieved a 20-foot egg-shaped non-human craft via helicopter external load
The egg was pearly white, smooth, seamless with no symbology, weighed less than 5,000 pounds
Experienced radiation poisoning symptoms (hair loss, skin peeling, nausea, heart murmur) after escorting a mystery box
Gary Nolan confirmed symptoms were similar to John Burroughs from Rendlesham Forest incident
Can summon the egg on demand and demonstrated this in August in broad daylight
The egg was tracked moving at approximately 10,000 mph
There are more than eight classes/categories of UAP
Ranking members of the UAP task force confirmed the egg was non-human intelligence
People have died who were coming out and speaking about these activities
Scored higher on IQ test (152 vs 138) when under oxygen deprivation stress
Gary Nolan has seen crash retrieval parts from Jacques Vallee
